---
title: "Yellow Island Intertidal Monitoring"
subtitle: "Process Notes"
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

### Process Overview

This is where I provide 2-3 sentences about what we're trying to accomplish with this project; the high-level steps will be laid out below.

### Quick Links

1.  Project repo

2.  Literature

3.  Methods

### Protocols Used

1.  Quadrats- random sampling and data recording
2.  Metadata recording
3.  eDNA sampling, water and sediment protocols

### Process Roadmap
[] Review and plan tide series
[] Set up data collection workflow
[] Collect data in the field
[] Process and analyze data
[] Interpret results and write up findings

### Log

#### 2026-03-24

Setting up the workflow with the minimum to determine if this system is going to work for me.
